verses.text: Paul, an apostle, greets 'the saints which are at Ephesus' with grace and peace. To the faithful. He writes to a beloved church.
Paul, an apostle, greets 'the saints which are at Ephesus' with grace and peace. To the faithful. He writes to a beloved church.
Blessed be God who 'hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings... in Christ,' chosen 'before the foundation of the world.' Eternal choice. Our blessings flow from God's ancient love.
Blessed be God who 'hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings... in Christ,' chosen 'before the foundation of the world.' Eternal choice. Our blessings flow from God's ancient love.
Blessed be God who 'hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings... in Christ,' chosen 'before the foundation of the world.' Eternal choice. Our blessings flow from God's ancient love.
Blessed be God who 'hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings... in Christ,' chosen 'before the foundation of the world.' Eternal choice. Our blessings flow from God's ancient love.
'In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace.' Redeemed. Pardon is bought by Christ's blood.
'In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace.' Redeemed. Pardon is bought by Christ's blood.
He made known the mystery, 'to gather together in one all things in Christ.' One purpose. God unites all things in His Son.
He made known the mystery, 'to gather together in one all things in Christ.' One purpose. God unites all things in His Son.
In whom we have obtained an inheritance, 'predestinated according to... his will.' Sure heirs. Our inheritance rests on God's purpose.
In whom we have obtained an inheritance, 'predestinated according to... his will.' Sure heirs. Our inheritance rests on God's purpose.
Ye were 'sealed with that holy Spirit of promise,' the earnest of our inheritance. Sealed. The Spirit is the pledge of glory to come.
Ye were 'sealed with that holy Spirit of promise,' the earnest of our inheritance. Sealed. The Spirit is the pledge of glory to come.
I cease not to pray that 'the eyes of your understanding' be enlightened to know your hope. Opened eyes. He prays for their spiritual sight.
I cease not to pray that 'the eyes of your understanding' be enlightened to know your hope. Opened eyes. He prays for their spiritual sight.
I cease not to pray that 'the eyes of your understanding' be enlightened to know your hope. Opened eyes. He prays for their spiritual sight.
I cease not to pray that 'the eyes of your understanding' be enlightened to know your hope. Opened eyes. He prays for their spiritual sight.
He prays they know 'the exceeding greatness of his power,' which raised Christ above all. Mighty power. The same power that raised Christ works in us.
He prays they know 'the exceeding greatness of his power,' which raised Christ above all. Mighty power. The same power that raised Christ works in us.
He prays they know 'the exceeding greatness of his power,' which raised Christ above all. Mighty power. The same power that raised Christ works in us.
He gave Him to be 'head over all things to the church, which is his body.' Head of all. Christ rules over all for His church.
He gave Him to be 'head over all things to the church, which is his body.' Head of all. Christ rules over all for His church.
